publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

sourceDesc.p: Work of the literatures of Ethiopia and Eritrea

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

assertion.unit: Miracles of Jesus
Salome praises Jesus
The resurrection of Sarah, Rebecca, and Rachel
The healing of a man who was deaf, mute, and blind
Jesusʾ sermon to the Apostles on Mount Sinai
The Passion, the Crucifixion, the death, and the burial of Jesus
Apparitions of Jesus after the ascension
The resurrection of Lazarus
The cattle robbed from the righteous Ṭǝṭmǝna
Jesusʾ sermon to the Apostles on the Mount of Olives
The marriage at Cana
The lions of Ashkelon
The miracles of the Child Jesus
The disciples pluck grain on the Sabbath (cf. Mark 2:23–28)
The expulsion of locusts from Galilee and Judaea, and the question of the Sabbath
The calling and the baptism of Simon and Andrew; The confession and the priority of Peter
The resurrection of the widow of Nain’s son
Legend of Abgar
The picture of Ezekiel’s vision
The olive branch planted by Zacchaeus
About the conception of Jesus
The healing of the woman suffering from hemmorage
The second recension of the Infancy Gospel
Jesusʾ sermon to the Apostles in Jerusalem
The fish stolen from a fisherman of Tiberias by his companions
The Samaritan woman Bǝrsinya
Miracle The Entrance of Jesus into the Temple
The Resurrection
The washing of the feet; The Last Supper; Judasʾ treason; Jesus is arrested
The baptism and temptation of Jesus
The resurrection of a dead man and the glorification of Jesus by sheep and an ox
Miracle The Theft of a Heifer in Galilee
The inundated field
The Epiphany
The miracle of the melons
The healing of a deaf mute suffering from elephantiasis
Miracle about the Nativity
Miracle about the Annunciation
Eschatological discourse of Jesus in Jericho
The adulterous woman
Mary Magdalene anoints the feet of Jesus in the house of Simon the Pharisee
The return of the Holy Family from Egypt and the meeting of the three brigands Ṭǝṭos, Darkǝs, and Gamhur
Jesus saves Joseph from a lion
Judas hangs himself; The Jews bribe the guardians of the sepulcher
The triumphant entry into Jerusalem; The expulsion of money changers and vendors from the temple
The imprisonment of Joseph of Arimathea and of many of his disciples; Their miraculous deliverance
Story of the family of Adam
On John the Evangelist as the author of the book; on the creation and the fall of the angels

t:abstract.t:p: A lengthy apocryphal gospel, very popular in Ethiopia

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Added corresp links to work records for individual miracles

t:bibl.title: Les miracles de Jésus<hi rend="italics">, I</hi>
Patrologia Orientalis
Les miracles de Jésus<hi rend="italics">, II</hi>
Patrologia Orientalis
Les miracles de Jésus<hi rend="italics">, III</hi>
Patrologia Orientalis
Les miracles de Jésus<hi rend="italics">, I</hi>
Patrologia Orientalis
Les miracles de Jésus<hi rend="italics">, II</hi>
Patrologia Orientalis
Les miracles de Jésus<hi rend="italics">, III</hi>
Patrologia Orientalis
Les manuscrits éthiopiens des ‘Miracles de Jésus’
Analecta Bollandiana

t:div.t:label: Introduction

t:bibl.title: Les miracles de Jésus<hi rend="italics">, I</hi>
Patrologia Orientalis

t:div.t:label: On John the Evangelist as the author of the book; on the creation and the fall of the angels
Story of the family of Adam
Miracles of Jesus
About the conception of Jesus
t:div.t:note: In some manuscripts the account can be a part of Introduction to the Miracles of Jesus

t:div.t:note: This miracle is not attested in Les manuscrits éthiopiens des ‘Miracles de Jésus’Analecta BollandianaLucasVan RompayVictorArras197593133-146bm:RompayArras1975Miraclesbm:RompayArras1975Miracles
